capabilities.label: Setup and lifecycle
capabilities.description: Install, inspect, repair, and remove the repository's native Git-hook integration without overwriting unrelated work.

capabilities.label: Commit inspection
capabilities.description: Inspect staged changes and commit messages before a commit while remaining advisory unless enforcement is explicitly configured.

capabilities.label: Push inspection
capabilities.description: Select the pushed range, discover related tests, and report configured test results before work leaves the repository.

capabilities.label: Safe explicit fixes
capabilities.description: Apply requested fixes only when staged and Git-history state proves that user work will be preserved.

capabilities.label: Git recovery guidance
capabilities.description: Explain a safe read-only starting point after a Git mistake without executing a recovery operation.

capabilities.label: Compatibility plumbing
capabilities.description: Preserve callable package integration surfaces that are intentionally secondary to the primary developer actions.
